member.name: T:Origam.Workbench.Services.Strings
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:Origam.Workbench.Services.Strings.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:Origam.Workbench.Services.Strings.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: P:Origam.Workbench.Services.Strings.DeploymentDeadlockBlockerFormat
P:Origam.Workbench.Services.Strings.DeploymentDeadlockCandidateFormat
P:Origam.Workbench.Services.Strings.DeploymentDeadlockHeader
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Deployment version order could not be determined, because circular dependencies were detected among some deployment versions. Successfully ordered deployment versions: {0} The sorting process failed with these deployment versions as the next step candidates: {1} .

member.name: P:Origam.Workbench.Services.Strings.DeploymentDeadlockHint
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to The deployment dependencies are broken. The only way to fix them now is to examine the individual deployment scripts in Architect, determine the correct execution order, and then update the deploymentDependenciesCsv elements in the respective .origam files of the conflicting DeploymentVersions..

member.name: P:Origam.Workbench.Services.Strings.DeploymentDeadlockPrereqConflicts
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to The following deployments would not be able to run later because they depend on other deployments from the current step.That is why the sorting cannot progress any further. {0} .

member.name: P:Origam.Workbench.Services.Strings.ErrorConstantNotFound
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Constant not found..

member.name: P:Origam.Workbench.Services.Strings.ErrorDeploymentDependsOnItself
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Deployment version: {0} of package: {1} depends on itself! Remove the dependency to continue..

member.name: P:Origam.Workbench.Services.Strings.ErrorDeploymentSorterInputOutputCountMismatch
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Number of input and output deployments doesn't match.

member.name: P:Origam.Workbench.Services.Strings.ErrorDifferentPackage
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to The imported model contains different package than the current model. Cannot import model..

member.name: P:Origam.Workbench.Services.Strings.ErrorFeatureListFailed
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Could not load feature list..

member.name: P:Origam.Workbench.Services.Strings.ErrorFeatureNotFound
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Requested feature not found in the current model..

member.name: P:Origam.Workbench.Services.Strings.ErrorFormLookupControlFail
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Form not passed with the lookup control. This will cause a memory leak..

member.name: P:Origam.Workbench.Services.Strings.ErrorGetLookupText
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Failed getting lookup text for lookup: {0}.

member.name: P:Origam.Workbench.Services.Strings.ErrorInfiniteLoopNoDependencies
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Infinite loop! Could not find any deployments without active dependencies..

member.name: P:Origam.Workbench.Services.Strings.ErrorModelNotLoaded
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Model not loaded..

member.name: P:Origam.Workbench.Services.Strings.ErrorNoDataServiceNoDocsService
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Data service not loaded! Cannot load the Documentation Service..

member.name: P:Origam.Workbench.Services.Strings.ErrorNoSuchColumn
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Filter specified but current lookup list does not contain such a column..

member.name: P:Origam.Workbench.Services.Strings.ErrorOlderModel
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to The model being imported is older than the current model. Cannot import model..

member.name: P:Origam.Workbench.Services.Strings.ErrorPackageLoadFailed
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Cannot load package. The package does not exist in this model..

member.name: P:Origam.Workbench.Services.Strings.ErrorParametersNull
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Parameters cannot be null..

member.name: P:Origam.Workbench.Services.Strings.ErrorParamNotFound
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Data constant/parameter not found..

member.name: P:Origam.Workbench.Services.Strings.ErrorRepositoryUpdateFailed
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Repository update failed.{0}.

member.name: P:Origam.Workbench.Services.Strings.ErrorSchemaListFailed
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Could not load schema list, check configuration file. {0}.

member.name: P:Origam.Workbench.Services.Strings.ErrorSettingsNotFound
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to OrigamSettings not found..

member.name: P:Origam.Workbench.Services.Strings.ErrorStringNotFound
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to String not found..

member.name: P:Origam.Workbench.Services.Strings.ErrorTooMuchExtensions
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Maximum number of loaded extensions in one step exceeded..

member.name: P:Origam.Workbench.Services.Strings.ErrorUnknownLookupType
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Unknown lookup type.

member.name: P:Origam.Workbench.Services.Strings.ErrorUnknownService
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Unknown service.

member.name: P:Origam.Workbench.Services.Strings.ErrorUnsupportedActivityType
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Activity type not supported by the deployment service..

member.name: P:Origam.Workbench.Services.Strings.ErrorUnsupportedTarget
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Target location not supported by the deployment service..

member.name: P:Origam.Workbench.Services.Strings.ErrorUpdateFailed
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Update failed..

member.name: P:Origam.Workbench.Services.Strings.ErrorUpdateRunning
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Update is already running. Cannot start update..

member.name: P:Origam.Workbench.Services.Strings.ErrorWhenUpdateScript
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Error occured while running update script '{0}'{1}.

member.name: P:Origam.Workbench.Services.Strings.Loading
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Loading {0}....

member.name: P:Origam.Workbench.Services.Strings.MultipleConstantsWithSameName
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Multiple constants with the same name "{0}" are present in the model. Model needs to be adjusted..

member.name: T:Origam.Workbench.AuditLogDA
member.summary: Summary description for AuditLogDA.
